name: Sanguinetti
desc: The host of Hotel Debord. Underneath his calm and elegant exterior, he scoffs at customers who buy the most expensive dishes in an attempt to flaunt their wealth instead of focusing on and appreciating the taste of such fine delicacies.

list.imgDesc: Hotel Debord, Court of Fontaine: Quartier Narbonnais - Fontaine

list.desc: *sigh* If you want tea or water, just help yourselves.
list.title: If you want tea or water...
